title: Church welcomes Nepal election landslide as new party sweeps out old guard
description: The Rastriya Swatantra Party won 125 of 165 directly elected seats in the March 5 vote, ending decades of coalition instability in the Himalayan nation.

en: Church welcomes Nepal election landslide as new party sweeps out old guard. The Rastriya Swatantra Party won 125 of 165 directly elected seats in the March 5 vote, ending decades of coalition instability in the Himalayan nation.

title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Directors Phil Lord and Christopher Miller Have ‘a Chip’ on Their Shoulders — but Not About This Film
description: After more than a decade out of director's chairs, the duo tell IndieWire about tackling Andy Weir's beloved novel, making audiences fall in love with a talking rock alien, and lessons from Yoda.
content: Phil Lord and Christopher Miller haven’t brought a film they’ve directed to theaters since 2014’s “22 Jump Street,” which only came out about four months after their “The Lego Movie” — a now somewhat… [+15300 chars]
de: „Project Hail Mary“-Regisseure Phil Lord und Christopher Miller haben „einen Chip“ auf ihren Schultern – aber nicht über diesen Film. Nachdem das Duo mehr als ein Jahrzehnt lang nicht mehr auf dem Regiestuhl gestanden hat, erzählt es IndieWire von der Auseinandersetzung mit Andy Weirs geliebtem Roman, davon, wie man das Publikum in einen sprechenden Rock-Alien verliebt und wie man von Yoda lernt.
en: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Directors Phil Lord and Christopher Miller Have ‘a Chip’ on Their Shoulders — but Not About This Film. After more than a decade out of director's chairs, the duo tell IndieWire about tackling Andy Weir's beloved novel, making audiences fall in love with a talking rock alien, and lessons from Yoda.
la: 'Project Ave Maria Directores Phil Dominus et Christopherus Miller' habent chip' de Humero — sed non de hoc film. Post plus quam decennium ex cathedras directoris, duo nuntiant IndieWire de armatione Andy Weir dilectae novae, audientias faciens amare alienam petram, et lectiones Yoda.
